5HT spike

SawchukS

2025-11-04

Action potential before and after 5HT application. looking at their mV plots

sh5HT = proj5HT::sh5HT
cells = sh5HT$cells 
print(cells)

#srt = loadHCT(cells[1])
# load5HTfigure = function(x, tag){
#   list.files()
# }
srt = loadHCT(cells[1], tag = "-srt.rds")
## No file found returning NULL
#srt = loadHCT("Q20.26.026.2A.05.02", tag = "-srt.rds")
library(rhdf5)
file = srt$md$nwb_file
print(file)
## [1] "//allen/programs/celltypes/workgroups/hct/HCT_Ephys_Data/NHP_expts/2020/Q20.26.026/Q20.26.026.2A.05.02-compressed.nwb"
print(file.exists(file))
## [1] TRUE
rhdf5::h5ls(file, recursive = FALSE)
##    group                      name       otype dclass dim
## 0      /               acquisition   H5I_GROUP           
## 1      /                  analysis   H5I_GROUP           
## 2      /          file_create_date H5I_DATASET STRING   4
## 3      /                   general   H5I_GROUP           
## 4      /                identifier H5I_DATASET STRING   1
## 5      /                processing   H5I_GROUP           
## 6      /       session_description H5I_DATASET STRING   1
## 7      /        session_start_time H5I_DATASET STRING   1
## 8      /            specifications   H5I_GROUP           
## 9      /                  stimulus   H5I_GROUP           
## 10     / timestamps_reference_time H5I_DATASET STRING   1
rhdf5::h5ls(file, recursive = FALSE)$name
##  [1] "acquisition"               "analysis"                 
##  [3] "file_create_date"          "general"                  
##  [5] "identifier"                "processing"               
##  [7] "session_description"       "session_start_time"       
##  [9] "specifications"            "stimulus"                 
## [11] "timestamps_reference_time"
blSweep_name = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_names[[grep("baseline", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_name))]]
blpeaks = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks[[grep("baseline", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks))]]
blsweep = nphys::extractNWB(srt$md$nwb_file, sweep = blSweep_name, slim = TRUE)
## [1] "//allen/programs/celltypes/workgroups/hct/HCT_Ephys_Data/NHP_expts/2020/Q20.26.026/Q20.26.026.2A.05.02-compressed.nwb"
#rhdf5::h5ls(srt$files$nwb, recursive = FALSE)$name

sweep_name = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_names[[grep("spikeTTL", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_name))]]
TTLpeaks = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks[[grep("spikeTTL", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks))]]
sweep = nphys::extractNWB(srt$files$nwb, sweep = sweep_name, slim = TRUE)
## [1] "//allen/programs/celltypes/workgroups/hct/HCT_Ephys_Data/NHP_expts/2020/Q20.26.026/Q20.26.026.2A.05.02-compressed.nwb"
#srt$smry = returnHCTsmry(srt$cell)

rate = srt$smry$sampling_rate[[grep(sweep_name, srt$smry$acquisition_names)]]

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
plot(sweep, type = "l")

#plot(blsweep, type = "l")
xf = convertIndex(sweep, rate)

fp = as.data.frame(TTLpeaks)
fp = fp[-nrow(fp),]
ap = 2

par(mfrow = c(2,3))
plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4])], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4])], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")
plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+100)], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+100)], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")
plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+1000)], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+1000)], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")


which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))
## [1] 134
ap = which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))


plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4])], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4])], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")
plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+100)], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+100)], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")
plot(xf[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+1000)], sweep[fp[ap,3]:(fp[ap,4]+1000)], type = "l", ylab = "mV", xlab = "Time (S)")

### Can build an overlay plot here

Do this for the APs at the peak of the change, and for the duration right before

par(mfrow = c(1,3))

preAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1):tail(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t < srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime],1)]


postAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime + 5],1)]


t0 = fp$epoch_t[which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))]
tLess = t0-2.5
tPlus = t0+2.5

maxAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > tLess],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > tPlus],1)]

plot(preAPs,type = "l", main = "baseline")
plot(postAPs, type = "l", , main = "at TTL")
plot(maxAPs, type = "l", , main = "max AP")

par(mfrow = c(1,3))

trace1 = dvdt_mV(preAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

trace2 = dvdt_mV(postAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

traceMax = dvdt_mV(maxAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

df1 = data.frame(trace1$dsignal)
df2 = data.frame(trace2$dsignal)
df3 = data.frame(traceMax$dsignal)

df0 = bind_rows(df1,df2,df3)

df0$ref = c(rep("baseline", nrow(df1)),rep("TTL", nrow(df2)),rep("max", nrow(df3)))

ggplot(df0, aes(x = L, y = V2, colour = ref)) + 
  geom_path()
## Warning: Removed 6 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_path()`).

par(mfrow = c(1,3))

firstBLAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1)]

plot(firstBLAP,type = "l", main = "firstAP")

TTLAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime],1)]

plot(TTLAP, type = "l", main = "TTL AP")

t0 = fp$epoch_t[which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))]

tLess = t0-2.5
tPlus = t0+2.5

maxrateAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t == t0],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t == t0],1)]

plot(maxrateAP, type = "l", main = "maxAP")

x1 = convertIndex(firstBLAP, rate)# - which.max(firstBLAP)
x2 = convertIndex(TTLAP, rate)
x3 = convertIndex(maxrateAP, rate)

x1 = zoo::index(firstBLAP) - which.max(firstBLAP)
x2 = zoo::index(TTLAP) - which.max(TTLAP)
x3 = zoo::index(maxrateAP) - which.max(maxrateAP)

tst = data.frame(APs = c(firstBLAP,TTLAP,maxrateAP), x = c(x1,x2,x3), ref = c(rep("baseline", length(firstBLAP)),rep("TTL", length(x2)),rep("max", length(x3))))

ggplot(tst, aes(x, APs, colour = ref)) +
  geom_path()

par(mfrow = c(1,3))

trace1 = dvdt_mV(firstBLAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(trace1$dsignal,type = "l")

trace2 = dvdt_mV(TTLAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(trace2$dsignal,type = "l")

traceMax = dvdt_mV(maxrateAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(traceMax$dsignal,type = "l")

df1 = data.frame(trace1$dsignal)
df2 = data.frame(trace2$dsignal)
df3 = data.frame(traceMax$dsignal)

df0 = bind_rows(df1,df2,df3)

df0$ref = c(rep("baseline", nrow(df1)),rep("TTL", nrow(df2)),rep("max", nrow(df3)))

ggplot(df0, aes(x = L, y = V2, colour = ref)) + 
  geom_path()
## Warning: Removed 6 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_path()`).

# If we remember from the TTL section of the sweep there is a delay between when the TTL goes on and the 5HT hits 
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

plot(fp$dvdtMax)

plot(fp$dvdtMin)

knitr::knit_exit()

Second Cell

srt = loadHCT(cells[2], tag = "-srt.rds")

blSweep_name = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_names[[grep("baseline", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_name))]]
blpeaks = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks[[grep("baseline", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks))]]
blsweep = extractNWB(srt$md$nwb_file, sweep = blSweep_name, slim = TRUE)

sweep_name = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_names[[grep("spikeTTL", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_name))]]
TTLpeaks = srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks[[grep("spikeTTL", names(srt$dfs$spikeTTL$sweep_peaks))]]
sweep = extractNWB(srt$files$nwb, sweep = sweep_name, slim = TRUE)

#srt$smry = returnHCTsmry(srt$cell)

rate = srt$smry$sampling_rate[[grep(sweep_name, srt$smry$acquisition_names)]]

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
#plot(blsweep, type = "l")
xf = convertIndex(sweep, rate)
plot(x = xf, y = sweep, type = "l")

fp = as.data.frame(TTLpeaks)
fp = fp[-nrow(fp),]
par(mfrow = c(1,3))

preAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1):tail(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t < srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime],1)]

#plot(preAPs,type = "l")

postAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime + 0.78],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime + 5.78],1)]

#plot(postAPs, type = "l")

t0 = fp$epoch_t[which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))]
tLess = t0-2.5
tPlus = t0+2.5

maxAPs = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > tLess],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > tPlus],1)]

#plot(maxAPs, type = "l")


plot(preAPs,type = "l", main = "baseline")
plot(postAPs, type = "l", , main = "at TTL")
plot(maxAPs, type = "l", , main = "max AP")
par(mfrow = c(1,3))

trace1 = dvdt_mV(preAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

trace2 = dvdt_mV(postAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

traceMax = dvdt_mV(maxAPs, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

df1 = data.frame(trace1$dsignal)
df2 = data.frame(trace2$dsignal)
df3 = data.frame(traceMax$dsignal)

df0 = bind_rows(df1,df2,df3)

df0$ref = c(rep("baseline", nrow(df1)),rep("TTL", nrow(df2)),rep("max", nrow(df3)))

ggplot(df0, aes(x = L, y = V2, colour = ref)) + 
  geom_path() +
  ylab("dvdt") +
  xlab("mV")
par(mfrow = c(1,3))

firstBLAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime - 5],1)]

plot(firstBLAP,type = "l", main = "firstAP")


TTLAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime+0.8],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t > srt$dfs$spikeTTL$ttlTime +0.8],1)]

plot(TTLAP, type = "l", main = "TTL AP")

t0 = 25#fp$epoch_t[which(fp$instRate == max(fp$instRate))]

tLess = t0-2.5
tPlus = t0+2.5

maxrateAP = sweep[head(fp$apONi[fp$epoch_t >= t0],1):head(fp$apOFFi[fp$epoch_t >= t0],1)]

plot(maxrateAP, type = "l", main = "maxAP")


x1 = convertIndex(firstBLAP, rate)# - which.max(firstBLAP)
x2 = convertIndex(TTLAP, rate)
x3 = convertIndex(maxrateAP, rate)

x1 = zoo::index(firstBLAP) - which.max(firstBLAP)
x2 = zoo::index(TTLAP) - which.max(TTLAP)
x3 = zoo::index(maxrateAP) - which.max(maxrateAP)

tst = data.frame(APs = c(firstBLAP,TTLAP,maxrateAP), x = c(x1,x2,x3), ref = c(rep("baseline", length(firstBLAP)),rep("TTL", length(x2)),rep("max", length(x3))))

ggplot(tst, aes(x, APs, colour = ref)) +
  geom_path() +
  xlab("time(ms)") +
  ylab("mV") + 
  xlim(-50,50) +
  theme_minimal()
par(mfrow = c(1,3))

trace1 = dvdt_mV(firstBLAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(trace1$dsignal,type = "l")

trace2 = dvdt_mV(TTLAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(trace2$dsignal,type = "l")

traceMax = dvdt_mV(maxrateAP, rate = rate, return = TRUE)

#plot(traceMax$dsignal,type = "l")

df1 = data.frame(trace1$dsignal)
df2 = data.frame(trace2$dsignal)
df3 = data.frame(traceMax$dsignal)

df0 = bind_rows(df1,df2,df3)

df0$ref = c(rep("baseline", nrow(df1)),rep("TTL", nrow(df2)),rep("max", nrow(df3)))

ggplot(df0, aes(x = L, y = V2, colour = ref)) + 
  geom_path()
# If we remember from the TTL section of the sweep there is a delay between when the TTL goes on and the 5HT hits 

par(mfrow = c(2,1))

plot(fp$dvdtMax)

plot(fp$dvdtMin)
